name: % CSP Achieved - Basic Book/Direct Marketing/NAC
definition: Percentage of claims in the Basic Book / Direct Marketing / NAC books that were handled via the CSP (Claims Service Provider) route. CSP, NAC and the book segments are internal definitions — confirm exact numerator/denominator with the A&H team.

name: % Fast Track Acieved
definition: Percentage of claims handled through the fast-track (simplified, low-touch) route in the period = Fast Track Claims / total eligible claims x 100. (Source name misspelled 'Acieved'.)

name: % Fast Track Target
definition: The target/benchmark percentage of claims that should be handled via fast track in the period.

name: % Fast Track Throughput
definition: Percentage of fast-track claims completed (closed) relative to fast-track claims entering the route in the period.

name: Acceptance Rate
definition: Percentage of decided claims that were accepted (not declined or walked away) = accepted claims / total decided claims x 100.

name: Avarage Paid
definition: Average amount paid per claim = total paid (indemnity + expense) / number of paid claims. (Source name misspelled 'Avarage'.)

sheet: Cycle Time and Static Claims Report
name: Average Cycle Time
definition: Average elapsed days from claim reported (or opened) to closed, across claims closed in the period.

name: Claims
definition: Count of claims meeting the selected criteria. Confirm whether this counts DISTINCT ClaimID (see business_rules.md).

definition: Total number of closed calims based on given criteria

name: Declinature Rate
definition: Percentage of decided (or new) claims that were declined = declined claims / total decided claims x 100.

name: Declined Claims
definition: Total number of claims declined

name: Fast Track Claims
definition: Count of claims handled via the fast-track route in the period.

sheet: Financials and MI for All Vendors at 13/12/2024
name: Count of UCRs received monthly
definition:
Count of UCRs received monthly refers to the total number of Unreported Claims Reserves (UCRs) that are recorded or acknowledged by the insurance company within a given month.
UCRs are estimates of the reserves set aside by an insurance company for claims that have occurred but have not yet been reported by policyholders.

sheet: Financials and MI for All Vendors at 13/12/2024
name: Data Completeness
definition:
Data completeness refers to the extent to which all required data is present and accounted for in financial reports and MI systems. It ensures that no critical data is missing, which is essential for accurate analysis, decision-making, and regulatory compliance.
Why -This sheet has been created to provide a comprehensive view of all vendors, detailing the financials and management information (MI) of both closed and open claims, along with the monthly count of UCRs.

sheet: Financials and MI for All Vendors at 13/12/2024
name: Incurred indemnity Vs Incurred fees
definition:
Incurred indemnity and incurred fees are terms used to describe different types of costs associated with insurance claims.
Incurred indemnity refers to the total amount of money that an insurance company expects to pay out to policyholders for covered losses.
Incurred fees refer to the expenses that an insurance company incurs in the process of handling and settling claims.

sheet: Financials and MI for All Vendors at 13/12/2024
name: Open Vs Closed Claims
definition:
It refer to the status of an insurance claim during the claims process. 
An open claim is one that has been reported to the insurance company but has not yet been fully resolved or settled. A closed claim is one that has been fully resolved and settled by the insurance company

sheet: Financials and MI for All Vendors at 13/12/2024
name: Referrals
definition: It refer to the process where an insurance agent or broker recommends a potential client to an insurance company or another agent. Referrals can also occur within the claims process when a claim is referred to a specialist or another department for further handling.

name: Average Case Cost
definition: Total Invoice Value paid over Total Operationally Closed Cases

name: Calls Offered
definition: Total Calls Offered

name: Calls Answered
definition: Total Calls Answered

name: Calls Abandoned
definition: Total Calls Offered minus Total Calls Answered

name: Calls Abandoned Rate %
definition: Number of abandoned over the Total Calls Offered

name: Calls Answered Rate %
definition: Total Calls Answered over Total Calls Offered

name: Average Abandonment Time
definition: Average Time to Abandon in HH MM SS

name: Average Speed of Answer
definition: Average Speed of Answer in HH MM SS

name: Number of Checked Cases
definition: Number of checked cases

name: Quality Checked %
definition: Number of checked cases over New Assistance Cases Received

name: Outcome-Passed
definition: Outcome minus Passed

name: USA Net Savings Current'
definition: Net Savings Value for USA for reporting Month

name: EUR Net Savings Current'
definition: Net Savings Value for EUR for reporting Month

name: ROW Net Savings Current'
definition: Net Savings Value for ROW for reporting Month

name: Total Net Savings Current'
definition: Total Net Savings Value for reporting Month

name: Total USA Net Savings
definition: Total Net Savings Value for USA

name: Total EUR Net Savings
definition: Total Net Savings Value for EUR

name: Total ROW Net Savings
definition: Total Net Savings Value for ROW

name: Total Net Savings
definition: Total Net Savings
